stakeholder.name: Beginner Investor
stakeholder.profile: - Owns a larger stock portfolio - Has limited knowledge of how stocks work - Wants to understand trends, patterns, and fluctuations - Needs simple, jargon-free explanations
stakeholder.needs: - Simple language explanations - Educational content about market factors - Guided interpretation of charts - Gradual complexity increase
stakeholder.pain-points: - Intimidated by complex 3D visualizations -> RESOLVED: Simple Mode available - Confused by technical jargon -> RESOLVED: Plain language explanations - Don't understand what charts show -> RESOLVED: ChartAnalysis component - No way to switch to simpler view -> RESOLVED: Toggle button added

stakeholder.name: Advanced Trader
stakeholder.profile: - Experienced with technical analysis - Uses multiple indicators and charts - Needs detailed data and metrics - Wants comprehensive analytical tools
stakeholder.needs: - Detailed technical indicators - Multiple chart types and views - Performance metrics and backtesting - Professional terminology
stakeholder.pain-points: - Frustrated by oversimplified interfaces -> RESOLVED: Detailed Mode available - Need more data, not less -> RESOLVED: All 4 charts per tab in Detailed Mode - Want advanced visualization options -> RESOLVED: 3D charts, Network, etc.

stakeholder.name: Financial Educator
stakeholder.profile: - Teaches investing concepts - Needs clear examples and visualizations - Wants to show both simple and complex views - Uses dashboard for teaching
stakeholder.needs: - Toggle between simple and detailed modes - Educational explanations for each chart - Ability to highlight key concepts - Professional presentation
stakeholder.needs-status: - Toggle between modes -> RESOLVED: Simple/Detailed toggle - Educational explanations -> RESOLVED: ChartAnalysis component - Highlight concepts -> RESOLVED: Each chart has explanation box - Professional presentation -> RESOLVED: Clean UI

stakeholder.name: Casual Market Observer
stakeholder.profile: - Interested in market trends - Not actively trading - Wants general understanding - Prefers quick overview
stakeholder.needs: - High-level market summary - Easy to digest visualizations - Quick insights without complexity
stakeholder.needs-status: - High-level summary -> RESOLVED: Overview tab in Simple Mode - Easy visualizations -> RESOLVED: 4 charts per tab - Quick insights -> RESOLVED: SectionAnalytics at top
